daily.today_energy: Your emotional intuition is basically running the show rn. Trust those gut feelings—they're not just vibes, they're literal cosmic guidance. Channel this sensitivity into something creative and watch how things unfold.
daily.love: Someone's picking up what you're putting down today, whether you realize it or not. If you're coupled up, deep conversations hit different right now. Single? Your aura is doing heavy lifting without you even trying.
daily.career: Your ability to read the room is unmatched today. Use that superpower to collaborate or pitch something you've been sitting on. The universe is basically handing you the confidence boost—don't sleep on it.
daily.health: Your body's asking for comfort and ease today. Move in ways that feel good rather than forcing intensity. A long bath, a walk, or just resting without guilt? All sacred acts rn. Listen to what you actually need.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically on steroids this week, Cancer. Trust those gut feelings—they're not just vibes, they're your superpower trying to tell you something real. Expect unexpected shifts that actually feel right.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, emotional honesty is hitting different rn. If you've been holding back how you really feel, this week's giving permission to be vulnerable. Real connection > surface level, always.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaking and people are noticing. Don't sleep on that idea you've been sitting on—conditions are aligning for you to pitch or start something. Your effort compounds this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for deeper rest, not just sleep. Explore what actually grounds you—could be movement, stillness, or something in between. Listen to what feels nourishing rather than obligatory.
